name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-dashboard-flows-plugin
description: Flow rendering plugin for pi-dashboard — pi-flows event reaction (FlowDashboard, FlowAgentCard, FlowArchitect, etc.)
//pi-dashboard-plugin-deferred-claims: session-card-badge (FlowActivityBadge) and session-card-action-bar (SessionFlowActions) are deferred until migrate-flows-jsx-to-slots adapts those components to accept {session} and pull app state from context. Until then they remain wired via direct JSX in SessionCard.tsx.
